Claim: Donald Trump made Juneteenth "very famous," as he described in a Wall Street Journal interview June 17, 2020. Prior to him planning a rally on June 19, "nobody had ever heard of it."
prediction: <statement>The claim that Donald Trump made Juneteenth "very famous" is not supported by the evidence. Trump's suggestion that no one knew about it before he planned a rally in Tulsa in June 2020 ignores this history.<cite>[42-42][43-43][44-44]</cite></statement>
